data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Rises Ahead Of Key Jobs Report; Tesla Deliveries Due (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today in the stock market, the Dow Jones index experienced a positive increase in anticipation of the upcoming jobs report. The stock of Tesla also saw a rise as delivery figures are expected to be released. The Dow Jones index rose, reflecting a positive sentiment in the market as investors awaited crucial economic data. Tesla's stock also climbed in anticipation of the delivery numbers. This live coverage captured the latest market movements and highlights the growing optimism among investors.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise With Tesla, Jobs Report Ahead
data.description: The stock market experienced a decline due to the impact of Meta's recent activities on SpaceX, Micron, and various AI-related stocks. Tesla is on the verge of reaching a buy point as it prepares for upcoming deliveries. Additionally, market watchers are anticipating the release of the June jobs report. Despite this, Dow Jones futures show a positive trend, with focus on Tesla's performance and the imminent jobs report.

data.title: Former solicitor and golf coach launches Clear The Shot on decision-making under pressure
data.description: David A. Graham, leveraging his experiences in law and professional golf coaching, recently released Clear The Shot, a comprehensive manual outlining strategic mental approaches for competitive golfers. The paperback edition became available for purchase globally on June 30, 2026. The book hit the market in HEXHAM, England, with the announcement made on July 2, 2026 via PRNewswire.

data.title: GARAGE GOES BIG IN NYC: FLATIRON JUST GOT A LOT HOTTER
data.description: On July 2, 2026, GARAGE, a brand originating from Montréal, announced its plan to expand into New York City after successfully establishing a presence in London. This expansion marks a significant step for the brand as it ventures into one of the leading fashion hubs globally. GARAGE revealed its intention to inaugurate its most extensive and engaging retail flagship yet in New York City, indicating a considerable growth trajectory for the company.

data.title: Jim and Mary Rogers Donates Historic IMSA GT Competitor to Philadelphia Museum Collection
data.description: On July 2, 2026, in Philadelphia, the Simeone Foundation Automotive Museum revealed the addition of a 1987 Jaguar XJR-7 to its esteemed collection. This car, generously donated by Jim Rogers from Vero Beach, Florida, enhances the museum's already impressive assortment of sports and racing vehicles. The museum, known for housing one of the most notable collections of its kind globally, continues to expand its offerings for visitors and car enthusiasts alike.

data.title: O'Shaughnessy Ventures Funds Researcher Classifying Chronic Pain
data.description: Alex Araki has been granted an O'Shaughnessy Fellowship by O'Shaughnessy Ventures LLC (OSV) in Greenwich, Conn. The fellowship aims to support the development of the initial diagnostic test capable of distinguishing various forms of chronic pain. This groundbreaking initiative was announced on July 2, 2026.

data.title: Center for Behavior Analysis Welcomes Palm Beach Gardens Community to New Facility Open House and Ribbon-Cutting Ceremony
data.description: On July 2, 2026, in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida, the Center for Behavior Analysis (CBA) announced the launch of its expanded therapeutic facility to serve the local community. A special event including an open house and ribbon-cutting ceremony took place on June 6 to mark this occasion.

data.title: Cannabix Technologies Announces Detection of Methamphetamine and Amphetamine in Human Breath
data.description: Cannabix Technologies Inc. has identified an important new opportunity with the detection of methamphetamine and amphetamine in breath. This development marks a significant advancement for the company, as it expands its capabilities beyond traditional detection methods. By leveraging breath analysis technology, Cannabix Technologies Inc. is now able to detect these substances with improved accuracy and efficiency. This breakthrough showcases the potential for the company to tap into the market for drug detection, which has a growing demand. With this new capability, Cannabix Technologies Inc. is poised to capitalize on this opportunity and establish itself as a key player in the industry.

data.title: Rivian Releases Q2 2026 Production and Delivery Figures, Raises Full Year Delivery Outlook and Sets Date for Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Rivian Automotive, Inc., based in Irvine, California, shared their production and delivery figures for the quarter ending June 30, 2026. During this period, the company manufactured 12,613 vehicles at their facility in Normal, Illinois and successfully delivered 12,194 vehicles. These delivery numbers exceeded Rivian's initial forecast of 9,000 to 11,000 vehicles for the quarter. This higher performance was attributed to the strong growth seen quarter-over-quarter in their electric delivery vans (EDV) and R1 models, along with the commencement of R2 deliveries.

data.title: NUBURU Issues Letter to Shareholders on Transformation Plan Execution, Initial Revenue Generation and Industrial Platform Build-Out
data.description: DENVER--In a recent announcement, NUBURU, Inc. (NYSE American: BURU), a dual-use Defense & Security integrated platform company, shared a letter to shareholders from Alessandro Zamboni, Executive Chairman and Co-Chief Executive Officer. Zamboni emphasized the significant transformation of NUBURU over the past year, highlighting its evolution from a company with limited scope to a diversified entity. The letter underscores the importance of clear communication amidst market distractions. Shareholders were directly addressed in the communication, demonstrating a transparent approach by the company.

data.title: End Child Poverty California Commends Key Elements of Governor Newsom's Final Budget to Ensure Wealthy Corporations Pay Their Fair Share, Calls on Lawmakers to Do More to Protect Children and Families
data.description: In Sacramento, California on July 2, 2026, End Child Poverty California (ECPCA) has praised certain components of the 2026–27 state budget recently approved by outgoing Gov. Gavin Newsom. The budget incorporates fresh revenue streams and capitalizes on a more optimistic budget projection for the year…

data.title: Music Market Watch Launches to Help Independent Artists Navigate the Future of Music
data.description: As of July 2, 2026, a new platform has been introduced in Miami to support artists by offering industry insights, strategic guidance, artist discovery opportunities, and access to trusted resources. Music Market Watch has officially launched to provide these services and aims to create a growing ecosystem for artists.
